title: Clinical and genetic features of a cohort of patients with MFN2-related neuropathy.
author: Abati E Manini A Velardo D Del Bo R Napoli L Rizzo F Moggio M Bresolin N Bellone E Bassi MT D'Angelo MG Comi GP Corti S
content: S-EPMC9008012 PMC9008012 Clinical and genetic features of a cohort of patients with MFN2-related neuropathy. Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease type 2A (CMT2A) is a rare inherited axonal neuropathy caused by mutations in MFN2 gene, which encodes Mitofusin 2, a transmembrane protein of the outer
